Frequently Asked Questions
1. Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 10 August 2025.
2. Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Exam Date?
The Examination will be conducted in 05-06 April 2026 .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 08 September 2025.
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 09 September 2025 .

tables: RPSC SI Sub Inspector / Platoon Commander 2025 Interview Letter 2026

Rajasthan Public Service Commission ( RPSC ) has released RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Interview Lettrer 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this RPSC Vacancy can apply online from 10 August 2025 to 08 September 2025 . candidates should read the RPSC Vacancy  information Notification for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.
Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Interview Letter 2026 Advt No. : 05/ 2025 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM Since 2012

Important Dates Application Begin : 10/08/2025 Last Date for Apply : 08/09/2025 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 08/09/2025 Admit Card Available : As Per Schedule Exam Date : 05-06 April 2026 Result Declared : As Per Schedule Interview Date : 08-17 July 2026

Application Fees (OTR) General / Other State : 600/- OBC / SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charge : 500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Cash at Rajasthan E Mitra Portal or Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI Payment Mode.

Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2026 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 27 Years. Age Relaxation as per Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Recruitment 2026 Rules.
